caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Elevated Seas Threaten Barbados Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing heavy, persistent showers with an 88% rain probability, southeasterly winds near 16 kt and seas to 5.6 ft with an ESE swell period of 7 s; Roatan is the runner-up with winds up to 22 kt. I recommend port authorities in Bridgetown and mariners secure loose gear, expect reduced visibility and brief coastal flooding in squalls, and delay small-boat operations while the main bands pass.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas Near Mykonos, 21 kt Winds
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeast swell with sustained winds of 21 kt, seas around 5.2 ft and a 6 s period, with less than 10% rain probability. Athens (Piraeus) is seeing lighter 13 kt winds, and I advise small craft to exercise caution in Mykonos waters where winds are within the Small Craft Advisory range.
